title: Minimax group-robust AUC super learner
summary: Super Learner explicitly supports AUC-based metalearning, and grouped CV is the right defense against race/year leakage.
rationale: Super Learner explicitly supports AUC-based metalearning, and grouped CV is the right defense against race/year leakage. The likely public-score gain is from combining complementary specialists while choosing weights that survive unseen groups, not from one more monolithic model.
implementation_hint: Generate OOF scores from heterogeneous specialists under `Race_Year` or leave-one-year-out splits, then fit a convex meta-learner that maximizes held-out AUC while penalizing poor worst-fold performance. Blend in score-rank space first; only calibrate probabilities on held-out folds after weights are fixed.
expected_effect: Reduces CV-to-LB drift and captures complementary signal from hazard, cliff, and hard-negative specialists.
risk: With few seasons and only 26 races, the meta-layer can overfit if base models are too correlated or weights are tuned on mixed groups.
